features.news_headline_summary: Fed officials signal data-dependent rate path; S&P 500 futures edge higher ahead of economic data

news_events_24h.headline: Fed officials signal data-dependent rate path
news_events_24h.summary: Markets watch upcoming CPI release for policy clues.

news_events_24h.headline: S&P 500 futures edge higher ahead of economic data
news_events_24h.summary: Index futures rise as traders await jobs report.

news_events_24h.headline: Singapore reports lower-than-expected inflation for April at 1.8%, revises economic growth higher
news_events_24h.summary: Core inflation — which strips out prices of private transport and accommodation —  came in at 1.4%, against estimates of 1.7%.
